# services.librespot

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.librespot`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.librespot.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Librespot (Spotify Connect speaker daemon). |
| `services.librespot.package` | `package` | The librespot package to use. |
| `services.librespot.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (null or boolean or string or signed integer or absolute path)` | Command-line arguments to pass to librespot. Boolean values render as a flag if true, and nothing if false. Null values are ignored. All other values are rendered as options with an argument. |
| `services.librespot.settings.cache` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a directory where files will be cached after downloading. |
| `services.librespot.settings.system-cache` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a directory where system files (credentials, volume) will be cached. |
